impact: Provides deterministic daemon-side validation helpers that reject syntax-recovery proposals for blocked domain tasks when they change multiple Python/TypeScript files or fail to include per-file syntax-preflight evidence.
summary: Add blocked-domain syntax recovery proposal guardrails
target_task: Task checkbox-127: Task checkbox-127: Add daemon validation that a syntax-recovery worker proposal touching a blocked domain task is rejected when it changes more than one source file or omits syntax-preflight evidence for every changed Python or TypeScript file.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
